flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Mount Wachusett Community College fell 11% between 2006 and 2009 (20.2% → 17.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mount Wachusett Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Mount Wachusett Community College rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 (48.0% → 56.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Mount Wachusett Community College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6k → 3.1k).
